# ---------------------------------
# Network packet crafting & analysis
# Used for custom packet inspection,
# testing malicious traffic patterns,
# and protocol-level analysis
# ---------------------------------
scapy>=2.5.0

# ---------------------------------
# PCAP / Wireshark packet parsing
# Reads .pcap captures generated by
# tcpdump or Wireshark
# ---------------------------------
pyshark>=0.6

# ---------------------------------
# Log analysis and reporting
# Useful for Snort, Squid, VPN,
# and system log correlation
# ---------------------------------
pandas>=2.2.0

# ---------------------------------
# Advanced regex matching
# Helps in IOC extraction and
# malicious signature matching
# ---------------------------------
regex>=2024.11.6

# ---------------------------------
# Better terminal visualization
# For colored SOC-style reports,
# threat tables, and alert output
# ---------------------------------
rich>=13.9.0

# ---------------------------------
# YAML config handling
# Useful for future automation of
# firewall rules and IOC feeds
# ---------------------------------
PyYAML>=6.0.2
